Death Guard
Contagion Engines and Death Lord’s Chosen (3 Detachment Points)
Force Dispositions: Priority Assets, Purge the Foe
Strike Force (2,000 Points)

  • 1x Twin plague spewer
  • Enhancements: Vile Vigour

     ◦ 1x Combi-bolter
